response:
The **cheapest Recurly alternatives** in the results are **Zoho Billing / Zoho Subscriptions**, **Stripe Billing**, and **Lago** if you want an open-source option.[5][1][3] Among the sources provided, **Zoho Billing** is explicitly described as “the most budget-friendly option,” starting at **$39/month**.[5]

A practical short list:

- **Zoho Billing / Zoho Subscriptions** — best when cost is the main factor; one source says it starts at **$39/month** and calls it the most budget-friendly option.[5]
- **Stripe Billing** — often cheaper if you already use Stripe for payments, since it’s part of the Stripe ecosystem and can reduce vendor sprawl.[1][7]
- **Lago** — offers a **free open-source product**, which can be the lowest software cost if you can handle more implementation work.[1]
- **Paddle** — worth considering if you want billing plus payment processing and tax compliance in one platform, though it is not presented as the cheapest option in the results.[1][3]
- **Chargebee / Maxio / Zuora** — common Recurly alternatives, but these are generally positioned more as feature-rich or enterprise tools than low-cost options.[3][4]

If your main goal is **lowest monthly spend**, **Zoho Billing** is the clearest answer from the search results.[5] If you want, I can also rank these by **cheapest overall**, **best for SaaS**, or **best for usage-based billing**.
